item.title: Pull request #2541 created
item.description:
2525 JNodes: map constructor

I decided to treat JNodes with and without roots differently.

I believe this is the best analogy for node constructors, which return the same result for embedded document and element nodes:

let $doc  := document { <xml/> }
let $new1 := <new>{ $doc/. }</new>
let $new2 := <new>{ $doc/xml }</new>
return deep-equal($new1, $new2)

Closes #2525
